query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS project_cost_overrides (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  project_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'References projects.id',
  rule_id INT NOT NULL COMMENT 'References cost_distribution_rules.id',
  override_pct_value DECIMAL(10,4) NULL COMMENT 'Override percentage (e.g. 1.5 instead of 2)',
  override_fixed_amount DECIMAL(15,2) NULL COMMENT 'Override fixed amount',
  override_source ENUM('investor','escrow') NULL COMMENT 'Override payment source',
  override_phase_start_month INT NULL COMMENT 'Override start month within phase',
  override_phase_end_month INT NULL COMMENT 'Override end month within phase',
  override_payment_schedule_json TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Override installment schedule JSON',
  notes TEXT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_project_rule (project_id, rule_id)
) COMMENT 'Per-project overrides for cost distribution rules';

  override_phase_start_month INT NULL COMMENT 'Override start month within phase',

  override_payment_schedule_json TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Override installment schedule JSON',
  notes TEXT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_project_rule (project_id, rule_id)
